meaning: n.于初赛获得以在半决赛时出赛的选手
examples: He won 11 titles, including Wimbledon and the U. s. Open, and was a semifinalist at the Australian and French Opens.
Your selection as a semifinalist is an exceptional achievement and you and your family should take great pride in this outstanding accomplishment.
Please accept my heartiest congratulations on being selected as a semifinalist in the 2006-07 Siemens Competition in Math, Science, and Technology!
Gasquet, a semifinalist in Miami last month, beat Croatian ninth seed Marin Cilic 7-5 6-4.
Last year's semifinalist Jie Zheng of China loves the surface and could figure again.
